title: convolvulus virgatus var. subaphyllus
intro: Convolvulus virgatus var. subaphyllus, also known as the dwarf morning glory, is a plant species that belongs to the family Convolvulaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Convolvulus virgatus var. subaphyllus include its potential to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
